Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 614}Kinkakuji temple? Kiyomizu temple? Are you kidding me...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 614}If we're in Kyoto, it's gotta be about the Shinsengumi! That's what I'm talking about![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 614}Iketaya's remains... And the Nishihongan temple, right!? Nooo... I won't have enough time![n]{f 1 1}
